title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VI-G. LICENSING OF FREE-STANDING BIRTH CENTERS

§2180.21. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Free-Standing Birth Center Licensing Law".

            Acts 2019, No. 332, §1, eff. June 11, 2019.
doc_text:
PART VI-G.  LICENSING OF FREE-STANDING BIRTH CENTERS
§2180.21.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Free-Standing Birth Center
Licensing Law".
Acts 2019, No. 332, §1, eff. June 11, 2019.
